description_long: This is a single-story blue bungalow with a flat roof and a rectangular footprint, featuring multiple windows and doors along its facades. The structure is surrounded by a backyard area that includes a swimming pool, a trampoline, a swing set, and two trees, suggesting a family-oriented residential environment. The main building has large windows and a central entrance, with the pool area directly accessible from the rear. The exterior walls are painted blue with white trim, and the roof appears to be flat and light-colored. The windows are arranged in a mostly regular pattern, providing ample natural light to the interior. The surrounding yard is landscaped with both hardscape and softscape elements, enhancing the livability and recreational appeal of the property.
description: A blue, single-story bungalow with a flat roof, surrounded by a backyard featuring a pool, trampoline, swing set, and trees. The house has large windows, a central entrance, and a landscaped outdoor area.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, large windows, and the full width of the blue bungalow, with the backyard amenities visible behind.
description_view_1: Side-rear view highlighting the swimming pool, trampoline, swing set, and trees, with the house's side wall and windows visible.
description_view_2: Rear view focusing on the pool area, backyard features, and the back facade of the bungalow with multiple windows.
description_view_3: Angled view showing the side and partial front of the bungalow, with the pool, swing set, and trampoline in the background.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with grouped side and rear windows
